expectations.text: four-sections-present: Output contains all four exec frame sections
expectations.evidence: Output contains 'What matters', 'Why now', 'Risk if we do nothing', 'Recommendation' as explicit headers

expectations.text: no-implementation-noise: Output does not mention microservices, Redis, or caching layer
expectations.evidence: None of those terms appear in the output — progress update was correctly stripped

expectations.text: surfaces-decision-point: Output mentions March 31 deadline or Q1/scope/unplanned
expectations.evidence: 'The deprecation deadline is March 31st' and 'Q1 roadmap' both present

expectations.text: clear-specific-ask: Recommendation does not end with 'your thoughts', 'let me know', or 'happy to discuss more'
expectations.evidence: Ends with 'I can bring a brief options breakdown to make that call efficient' — specific and purposeful
Exec frame sections total approximately 155 words
